dict.string: Rung uses Apple Health data to verify your habits and award accurate leaderboard points.
Rung can log workouts and mindfulness minutes back to Apple Health.
Rung sends habit reminders, streak warnings, and accountability nudges from your mentor.
Rung uses Screen Time limits to verify your social-media-detox habits without tracking what you do in those apps.
Rung reads today's events so it can suggest a streak freeze on busy days and surface tasks tied to your meetings.
Rung reads today's events so it can suggest a streak freeze on busy days and surface tasks tied to your meetings.
